metadata.scene_summary: A rain-cut crossroads where three paths open at once: one lit, one buried in whispering reeds, and one hidden behind old gravestones.
metadata.sanity_question: When already strained, which road preserves enough clarity to keep moving?

options.label: Follow the lantern road toward the watchpost

add_events: Paid a watch tax and kept to the visible road.
Something moved beside you in the reeds and never showed itself.

options.label: Take the grave trail and trust the symbols

add_events: You reached the old graves and copied a symbol you do not fully understand.
